Package sting

Annotation Interface Eager

@Documented @Retention(RUNTIME) @Target({TYPE,METHOD}) public @interface Eager
Annotation indicating that the component should be eagerly instantiated when the Injector is created. The annotation may be applied to types annotated by Injectable, to types annotated with an annotation meta-annotated by ActAsStingProvider or ActAsStingComponent, or to methods contained in types annotated by Fragment.
